summary: Retested QR visibility in PaymentModal on desktop (1280x800) and mobile (390x844). QR image loads correctly from local /payment-qr.jpg on both viewports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR bug fix verified. Local /payment-qr.jpg loads with naturalWidth 680 on both desktop & mobile. Buy button -> modal -> QR/item/amount/UPI id all render correctly. Note: payment-modal element remains in DOM after close (uses open class toggle) so use visibility/class check rather than count() for close verification.
